# Melli Exchange — llms.txt

## About This Site

Melli Exchange (melliexchange.ca) is a FINTRAC-registered currency exchange and gold jewelry dealer
located in Coquitlam, British Columbia, Canada. The business has served the Greater Vancouver
community for over a decade, offering competitive exchange rates on major world currencies and
live gold prices across multiple karat weights.

## Purpose

This website provides:
- Live currency exchange rates (CAD vs. USD, EUR, GBP, AED, IRR, and 10+ more currencies)
- Daily gold prices in CAD for 10K, 14K, 18K, 22K, and 24K gold
- A currency calculator for quick CAD conversions
- Market news and analysis sourced from VBCE, FXStreet, and Kitco
- Store information, hours, and contact details

## Key Pages

- / (homepage): Overview of live rates, gold prices, currency calculator, and business highlights
- /en/currencies: Full table of live buy/sell exchange rates with historical price chart
- /en/gold: Gold spot price (sourced from Kitco) and per-gram prices for each karat weight
- /en/products: Physical gold and jewelry products available for purchase in-store
- /en/news: Market watch — currency and gold news aggregated from industry sources
- /en/faq: Answers to common questions about currency exchange, ID requirements, and gold buying
- /en/about: Business background, regulatory compliance, and service overview
- /en/contact: Address, phone numbers, business hours, and embedded map

## Business Details

- Name: Melli Exchange
- Address: 1102-1163 Pinetree Way, Coquitlam, BC V3B 8A9, Canada
- Phone: +1 (778) 929-9447 | +1 (604) 905-9033
- Email: info@melliexchange.ca
- Hours: Monday–Friday 9:30 AM–7:00 PM, Saturday 10:00 AM–6:00 PM, Sunday Closed
- Languages: English, Persian (Farsi), Arabic, Chinese (Mandarin)
- Regulatory: Registered with FINTRAC (Financial Transactions and Reports Analysis Centre of Canada)

## Technical Notes

- The site is a multilingual Next.js application supporting English (en), Persian (fa), Arabic (ar), and Chinese (zh)
- Exchange rates and gold prices are fetched from the backend API and updated in near real-time
- All structured data is provided via JSON-LD (Organization, LocalBusiness, FAQPage, WebPage schemas)
- A sitemap is available at /sitemap.xml with lastmod dates for all URLs

## Content Licensing

All exchange rate data, gold prices, and news content on this site are provided for informational
purposes. Rates shown are indicative and may differ from in-store rates at time of transaction.
